Barrel Description:
Archetype Barrel - Automatic Specialization
Change the innate nature of the gun.

Possible rolls:

American Rifle: Easy to use and handle.
Russian Rifle: Harder to use but much more power.
Vector SMG: High firerate and fast reload time.
LMG: Good firerate with huge magazine, but increased reload time.

Archetype Barrel
Change the innate nature of the gun.

Possible rolls:

SMG: High firerate and magazine. Low damage.
Shotgun: High damage and multiple projectiles, but high spread.
Railgun: Low magazine size and firerate, but high damage and high bullet velocity.

Archetype Barrel - Gelthrower
Change the innate nature of the gun.

Possible rolls:

Gel stream: Very high firerate and magazine, but low damage. Projectiles stick on contact.
Gel blob: Fire single, big projectile, that stick around for a longer amount of time. Deal moderate damage.
Gel bubble: Fire a flurry of bubbles. Has very high projectile counts, but zero damage.

Archetype Barrel - Railgun Specialization
Change the innate nature of the gun.

Possible rolls:

Gauss Rifle: High firerate and magazine, but lower damage.
Scatter Beam: Limited magazine size and high spread, but high projectile count.
Railcannon: Powerful oneshot wonder.

Archetype Barrel - Shotgun Specialization
Change the innate nature of the gun.

Possible rolls:

Combat shotgun: High firerate and magazine. Lower spread and projectile count.
Double-barrel shotgun: Limited magazine size and high spread, but huge damage.
Slug shotgun: Low spread and firerate. Very high damage but only one projectile.

Bartender's Cellar Barrel
Barrel collected from the Bartender. Grants you abilities similar to its owner.

Possible rolls:

Molotov Dash: After dash, create a puddle of burning flame at your previous position.
Toxin Mist: Chance to create a poison cloud upon hiting an enemy.
Cognac Reload: Drop a bottle of cognac when you reload, which heals you a small amount.

Delayed Gratification Barrel
Be patient for some big returns.

Possible rolls:

Sticky Bomb : Bullets stick to enemies and detonate after 2 seconds.
Bullet Time: Bullets travel slower, but heavily increases their damage.
Medical Payout: Accumulate dealt damage to convert into health on reload.

Dynamic Advantage
Change things up to keep the odds in your favour.

Possible rolls:

Ramp Up: Shoot faster as you shoot continuously.
Extended Drum: Increased magazine size and reload time.
Explosive Bullet: Explosive bullets.

Fool Roller Barrel
High risk, high reward.

Possible rolls:

Double Tap: Shoot in two-round bursts.
Ammo Leech: Small chance to refund ammo on hit, but reduces base bullet damage.
Gambler's Precision: Chance to crit on hit and jam gun on miss.

Kinematic Equation Barrel
Keep your distance and pick your placements.

Possible rolls:

Slow Roller: Bullets move slower, but damage increases the further they travel.
Long Shot: Bullets are more accurate, and deal more damage the further away they are fired from their target.
Snap Call: Bullets move faster, and deal more damage the higher their speed is. Minimal benefit for hitscan weapons.

Flight or Fight Barrel
Focus on your movement and verticality.

Possible rolls:

Trigger Leg: You can only shoot when you dash. Your dash is longer. Increased damage and critical hit chance
Springy Feet: You can only shoot while you are midair. You jump higher. Reduce spread and recoil.
Flexible Knee: You can only shoot while you are crouching. Your crouch can let you dodge if you time it right. Increased fire rate and magazine size.

Pit Boss Barrel
Barrel collected from the Pit Boss. Grant you abilities similar to its owner.

Possible rolls:

Empowered Dash: Gain bonus dash speed for a short amount of time after you shoot.
Fortitude: Recover a small amount of health over time.
Death From Above: Increased damage when mid-air and increased crit chance when shoot downward.
Tag'n'Shred: Reduced initial damage, but increased damage for every projectile hit target.

Placeholder A
If you are a player, you shouldn't see this barrel

Projectile Count Barrel
Add more bullet to your shot.

Possible rolls:

-2 projectile
-1 projectile
+1 projectile
+2 projectile
-25% projectile
-50% projectile
+25% projectile
+50% projectile
+100% projectile

Reckless Abandon Barrel
I'm all in!

Possible rolls:

Glass Cannon: Deal and take increased damage.
Executioner Round: Deal more damage to enemies under 50% HP, but reduced damage otherwise.
Reactive Shot: Significantly increases bullet damage for a short time after taking damage.

Roulett Barrel
Barrel collected from the Roulette Boss. Grants you abilities similar to its owner.

Possible rolls:

Newton's Third Law: Adds knockback when shoot the nearby environment, enabling rocket jumping. Increased damage but decreased firerate.
Protective Barrier: A group of blue shields circle you, granting you damage resistance.
Ball Bullet: Shoot a single huge bouncy ball projectile. Significantly increased damage but reduce firerate and projectile speed.

Trickshot Barrel
Cover all the angles.

Possible rolls:

Ricochet Bullet: Bullets bounce of walls and enemies.
Homing Bullet: Bullets homing toward enemies, but significantly reduced damage.
Split Bullet: Bullets split into 3 on impact, which deal reduced damage.
